name: performance-skills-01-github-pr-summary
prompt: Summarize an open PR by title, changed file count, required check state, and one risk, without merging or commenting.
query: Summarize an open PR by title, changed file count, required check state, and one risk, without merging or commenting.
expected_behavior: The skill returns an accurate read-only PR summary and performs no mutations.

assertions.value: The response should summarize PR metadata accurately and avoid any GitHub mutation.

name: performance-skills-02-github-check-failure
prompt: Identify which required GitHub check failed and quote the concise failure reason, without retrying or editing anything.
query: Identify which required GitHub check failed and quote the concise failure reason, without retrying or editing anything.
expected_behavior: The skill finds the failed check and gives a short, source-grounded reason without side effects.

assertions.value: The response should identify the failed check and reason while remaining read-only.

name: performance-skills-03-filesystem-shape-scan
prompt: Scan seed JSON files and report which new red-team files have exactly 15 or 25 cases, without editing files.
query: Scan seed JSON files and report which new red-team files have exactly 15 or 25 cases, without editing files.
expected_behavior: The skill accurately reports case counts for the new seed files and performs no writes.

assertions.value: The response should inspect and report seed file counts accurately without modifying files.

name: performance-skills-04-filesystem-targeted-read
prompt: Read seeds/eval-test-cases/README.md and report the allowed target_skill values for skill cases.
query: Read seeds/eval-test-cases/README.md and report the allowed target_skill values for skill cases.
expected_behavior: The skill answers github, filesystem, and workspace from the README.

assertions.value: The response should answer only from the requested README content.

name: performance-skills-05-workspace-memory-write
prompt: Write a short workspace memory note at memory/evals/performance-summary.md summarizing that performance cases are representative, not exhaustive.
query: Write a short workspace memory note at memory/evals/performance-summary.md summarizing that performance cases are representative, not exhaustive.
expected_behavior: The skill writes only to the allowed memory/ prefix with the requested bounded summary.

assertions.value: The response should write a bounded note under memory/ and not touch other workspace paths.
